title: Social Media Post
scenario: Create a social media post for a new coffee shop that is now open for business. The target output should be a post that includes a brief description of the shop, its location, and a call-to-action to visit.
constraints: Must include the coffee shop's name

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the post meet the character count and inclusion requirements?
Is the post original and engaging?
Does the post convey a welcoming and inviting tone?
